results.description: EMERALD CITIES COLLECTIVE (ECC) WILL FOCUS ON THE DEVELOPMENT AND IMPLEMENTATION OF THE ADVISORY COUNCIL. THROUGH THE ADVISORY COUNCIL, ECC WILL SUPPORT THE DEVELOPMENT OF COMMUNICATION AND OUTREACH MATERIALS. ECC’S ACTIVITIES WILL ALSO SUPPORT THE DEVELOPMENT OF THE APPLICATION, THE APPLICATION INTAKE PROCESS, AND THE APPLICATION EVALUATION PROCESS. ECC'S AREAS OF WORK INCLUDE ESTABLISHING A PARTICIPATORY GOVERNANCE STRUCTURE; OUTREACH TO ENVIRONMENTAL COMMUNITIES PROMOTE TCGM; AND PARTICIPATING IN THE DEVELOPMENT OF EVALUATION TOOLS AND PROTOCOLS.

RIVER NETWORK WILL SUPPORT OVERALL LEADERSHIP FOR THE THRIVING COMMUNITIES GRANTMAKER PROGRAM (TCGP) THROUGH THE PROJECT LEADERSHIP COMMITTEE, SERVE AS OVERALL TCGP STORYTELLING LEAD, AND SUPPORT CAPACITY-BUILDING ACTIVITIES FOR POTENTIAL TCGP APPLICANTS, SELECTED GRANTEES, AND REGIONAL GRANTMAKERS AND THEIR NETWORKS. RIVER NETWORK WILL LEAD ALL STORYTELLING ACTIVITIES, IN PARTNERSHIP WITH THE INSTITUTE OF SUSTAINABLE COMMUNITIES, AND CREATE THE OVERALL TCGP COMMUNICATIONS FRAMEWORK AND SYSTEMS IN COORDINATION WITH PROJECT PARTNERS THAT ARE LEADING ON TCGP OUTREACH ACTIVITIES. THIS INCLUDES DEVELOPING AN OVERARCHING STORYTELLING PLAN AND BUDGET; COMPILING A NATIONAL DATABASE OF PARTNER NETWORKS, JOURNALISTS AND COMMUNICATIONS OUTLETS FOR OUTREACH AND STORY DISSEMINATION; AND DETERMINING CONTRACTOR NEEDS TO SUPPORT STORY PLACEMENT AND GRANTEE COMMUNICATIONS TRAINING.

GROUNDWORK USA WILL LEAD THE DEVELOPMENT OF A CAPACITY BUILDING PROGRAM FOR EJ-ERG GRANTEES AND SUPPORT THE DEVELOPMENT OF OUTREACH AND EVALUATION MATERIALS. GROUNDWORK USA WILL ALSO LEAD THE EJ-ERG CAPACITY BUILDING WORKING GROUP AND DEVELOP A HIGH-LEVEL PROGRAM DESIGN AND WORK PLAN, INCLUDING A GRANTEE ONBOARDING PROCESS AND OPPORTUNITIES FOR SKILL-BUILDING AND KNOWLEDGE SHARING SUCH AS VIRTUAL AND IN-PERSON WORKSHOPS, WEBINARS, AND 1:1 CONSULTS. GROUNDWORK USA, IN PARTNERSHIP WITH THE INSTITUTE FOR SUSTAINABLE COMMUNITIES, WILL FACILITATE THE OUTREACH WORKING GROUP. KEY ACTIVITIES INCLUDE IDENTIFYING OUTREACH STRATEGIES, LANGUAGE PRIORITIES, TRANSLATION NEEDS, AND ANY GAPS THAT MAY EXIST IN SUPPORT. GROUNDWORK USA WILL DEVELOP EJ-ERG-SPECIFIC BRANDING FOR VARIOUS MATERIALS, INCLUDING WEBSITE AND COLLATERAL, AND OFFER SUPPORT WITH VISUAL BRAND CREATION. GROUNDWORK USA WILL CONTRIBUTE TO THE DEVELOPMENT OF COMMUNICATIONS, OUTREACH, AND ENGAGEMENT STRATEGY FOR THE RFP, CAPACITY BUILDING PROGRAM, AND THE DATA VISUALIZATION HUB.

GROUNDWORK USA WILL LEAD THE DEVELOPMENT OF A CAPACITY BUILDING PROGRAM FOR EJ-ERG GRANTEES AND SUPPORT THE DEVELOPMENT OF OUTREACH AND EVALUATION MATERIALS. GROUNDWORK USA WILL ALSO LEAD THE EJ-ERG CAPACITY BUILDING WORKING GROUP AND DEVELOP A HIGH-LEVEL PROGRAM DESIGN AND WORK PLAN, INCLUDING A GRANTEE ONBOARDING PROCESS AND OPPORTUNITIES FOR SKILL-BUILDING AND KNOWLEDGE SHARING SUCH AS VIRTUAL AND IN-PERSON WORKSHOPS, WEBINARS, AND 1:1 CONSULTS. GROUNDWORK USA, IN PARTNERSHIP WITH THE INSTITUTE FOR SUSTAINABLE COMMUNITIES, WILL FACILITATE THE OUTREACH WORKING GROUP. KEY ACTIVITIES INCLUDE IDENTIFYING OUTREACH STRATEGIES, LANGUAGE PRIORITIES, TRANSLATION NEEDS, AND ANY GAPS THAT MAY EXIST IN SUPPORT. GROUNDWORK USA WILL DEVELOP EJ-ERG-SPECIFIC BRANDING FOR VARIOUS MATERIALS, INCLUDING WEBSITE AND COLLATERAL, AND OFFER SUPPORT WITH VISUAL BRAND CREATION. GROUNDWORK USA WILL CONTRIBUTE TO THE DEVELOPMENT OF COMMUNICATIONS, OUTREACH, AND ENGAGEMENT STRATEGY FOR THE RFP, CAPACITY BUILDING PROGRAM, AND THE DATA VISUALIZATION HUB.

THROUGH INTENTIONAL DESIGN, COLLABORATION, AND IMPLEMENTATION, TPL WILL BOTH LEAD AND SUPPORT MEANINGFUL COMMUNICATION PLATFORMS THAT CENTER THE NARRATIVES, IMPACT, DATA, AND INSIGHTS OF THE ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE COMMUNITIES INVOLVED IN THIS OPPORTUNITY. THE ACTIVITIES WILL FOCUS ON THREE KEY AREAS RANGING FROM CONDUCTING NEEDS ASSESSMENTS, STANDARDIZING PROCESSES AND INFRASTRUCTURE, COMMUNITY OUTREACH & ENGAGEMENT, AND DEVELOPING A MEASUREMENT AND EVALUATION FRAMEWORK. EMERALD CITIES COLLECTIVE (ECC) WILL FOCUS ON THE DEVELOPMENT AND IMPLEMENTATION OF THE ADVISORY COUNCIL. THROUGH THE ADVISORY COUNCIL, ECC WILL SUPPORT THE DEVELOPMENT OF COMMUNICATION AND OUTREACH MATERIALS. ECCÃƑÂ¢Ã¢Â€ŠÂ¬Ã¢Â€ŽÂ¢S ACTIVITIES WILL ALSO SUPPORT THE DEVELOPMENT OF THE APPLICATION, THE APPLICATION INTAKE PROCESS, AND THE APPLICATION EVALUATION PROCESS. ECC'S AREAS OF WORK INCLUDE ESTABLISHING A PARTICIPATORY GOVERNANCE STRUCTURE; OUTREACH TO ENVIRONMENTAL COMMUNITIES PROMOTE TCGM; AND PARTICIPATING IN THE DEVELOPMENT OF EVALUATION TOOLS AND PROTOCOLS.

URBAN SUSTAINABILITY DIRECTORS NETWORK (USDN) WILL SUPPORT ACTIVITIES TO ESTABLISH THE ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE EASTERN REGION GRANTMAKER (EJ-ERG) AND PREPARE FOR EACH ROUND OF REQUEST FOR APPLICATIONS (RFA) RELEASES, PROVIDING SPECIFIC SUPPORT ON WAYS LOCAL GOVERNMENTS AND THEIR SUSTAINABILITY STAFF CAN SUPPORT EQUITABLE ACCESS TO SUBGRANTS AND BUILD TRUST AND PARTNERSHIPS WITH LOCAL COMMUNITY-BASED ORGANIZATIONS. USDN STAFF WILL PARTICIPATE IN REGULAR MEETINGS AND ACTIVITIES OF THE PROJECT LEADERSHIP COMMITTEE AND VARIOUS WORKING GROUPS, AS WELL AS ANY ADDITIONAL IN-PERSON PARTNER MEETINGS. PRIOR TO EACH RFA RELEASE, USDN WILL ENSURE ITS RESOURCE CATALOG FOR LOCAL GOVERNMENT PRACTITIONERS IS UP TO DATE WITH CURRENT PROGRAMS AND ACTIVITIES AIMED TOWARD CAPACITY BUILDING FOR LOCAL GOVERNMENT STAFF AS PARTNERS TO SUBGRANTEES. USDN WILL ASSIST IN EVALUATING OUTREACH ACTIVITIES AND IDENTIFY KEY AUDIENCES/COMMUNITIES WHERE TAILORED OUTREACH EFFORTS ARE NEEDED. STAFF WILL WORK WITH USDN MEMBERS TO UNDERSTAND POTENTIAL BARRIERS TO OUTREACH EFFORTS AND OPPORTUNITIES FOR EXPANDED REACH IN THEIR COMMUNITIES WHERE APPLICABLE.
